rationale: Builds directly on the current best late projection EMA path, but pivots away from the recent EMA chooser variants toward a lower-byte quantizer improvement. The change keeps the winning training loop intact and only upgrades the final roundtrip math: int8 rows now get a least-squares affine refit for scale, projection matrices always keep the affine offset, and projection rows get one extra requantization/refit pass before serialization. That targets the real objective by reducing projection reconstruction error under the same int8 format and nearly the same artifact budget.
title: Projection Affine Refit Int8
